---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
<!-- What are you trying to do today that's harder than it should be? -->

**Proposal**
<!-- Sketch of the change. A concrete API or CLI invocation beats abstract
     description. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- What else did you try? Why did you rule them out? -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Links to specs, screenshots, related issues. -->
